entities.description: An investment portfolio tracking a collection of asset holdings.

fields.name: total_cost_basis

computed.formula: See domain_rules for total_cost_basis computation logic

fields.computed_from: SUM(net_amount) for all buy trades on portfolio

computed.formula: See domain_rules for current_value computation logic
See domain_rules for unrealized_gain_loss computation logic
See domain_rules for unrealized_gain_loss_pct computation logic

fields.name: total_realized_gain_loss

computed.formula: See domain_rules for total_realized_gain_loss computation logic

fields.computed_from: Accumulated from sell trades: SUM(realized_gain per sell trade)

computed.formula: See domain_rules for total_dividends_received computation logic

entities.name: Portfolio

entities.description: An investable asset (stock, bond, ETF, crypto, etc.) that can be held in portfolios.

indexes.name: idx_assets_org_ticker
indexes.note: Partial unique index for non-null tickers

entities.name: Asset

entities.description: A position in a specific asset within a portfolio.

computed.formula: See domain_rules for total_cost_basis computation logic
See domain_rules for current_value computation logic
See domain_rules for unrealized_gain_loss computation logic
See domain_rules for unrealized_gain_loss_pct computation logic
See domain_rules for weight_in_portfolio computation logic

entities.name: Holding

entities.description: A buy, sell, dividend, split, or transfer transaction against a portfolio asset.

computed.formula: See domain_rules for gross_amount computation logic

fields.name: net_amount
fields.computed_from: if buy: gross_amount + commission + fees; if sell: gross_amount - commission - fees

entities.name: Trade

entities.description: Daily computed performance metrics for a portfolio.
entities.name: PerformanceMetric

entities.description: Historical OHLCV price data for an asset.
entities.name: PriceHistory

portfolios.description: Recompute current values from latest prices

performance_metrics.description: Compute metrics for all portfolios (background job)

state.portfolioStore_description: Stores selected portfolio, revalue status, and active time period for charts
state.tradeFormStore_description: Stores draft trade entry during creation

websocket_events.description: Emitted when asset price is updated (real-time or manual)
Emitted when a trade is confirmed
Emitted when portfolio current values are recomputed
Emitted when daily performance metrics are computed

steps: POST /trades with trade_type=buy, portfolio_id, asset_id, quantity, price, commission, fees
Server computes net_amount = gross_amount + commission + fees
If Holding exists for (portfolio_id, asset_id): new_avg_cost = (current_quantity * avg_cost_basis + net_amount) / (current_quantity + quantity); quantity += quantity
If Holding does not exist: create new Holding with avg_cost_basis = net_amount / quantity
journal_entry_side_effects: DR Investment Asset (asset account) / CR Cash/Bank

steps: Server computes net_amount = gross_amount - commission - fees
If Holding.quantity == 0: delete or mark holding inactive
journal_entry_side_effects: DR Bank / CR Investment Asset (at cost basis)
CR Realized Gain or DR Realized Loss for the difference

steps: Background job fetches latest prices for all assets
Recalculate Holding.current_value and unrealized_gain_loss for all holdings
Compute and store PerformanceMetric for the day

computed_fields.formula: if buy: gross_amount + commission + fees; if sell: gross_amount - commission - fees

domain_rules.rule: Sell quantity cannot exceed holding quantity
domain_rules.api_guard: Return 422 if trade.quantity > holding.quantity for sell trades
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Quantity input capped at current holding quantity for sell trades; show remaining balance

domain_rules.rule: Trade price must be greater than 0
Asset ticker must be unique within org if provided
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show error if duplicate ticker entered
domain_rules.db_constraint: UNIQUE partial index on (org_id, ticker) WHERE ticker IS NOT NULL

domain_rules.rule: Holding quantity must not go negative after sell
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Prevent sell quantity exceeding current holding; show error message

domain_rules.rule: Closed portfolio cannot receive new trades
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Trade entry disabled for closed portfolios; show closed status badge

domain_rules.rule: PerformanceMetric metric_date must be unique per portfolio
domain_rules.api_guard: Upsert on conflict (org_id, portfolio_id, metric_date) to update rather than duplicate

deleted_at.notes: Soft delete — all queries filter deleted_at IS NULL

org_id_injection.middleware: req.body.org_id is stripped; injected from req.user.org_id

conflict_response.message: Record was modified by another user. Refresh and retry.

concurrency.high_contention_tables: see entities with high write concurrency

audit_trail.triggers: application-level (before write hook) — never DB trigger to avoid log bloat

standard_constraints.name: chk_{table}_deleted_order
standard_constraints.expression: deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at

db_constraints_policy.enum_validation: DB ENUM types preferred over VARCHAR + CHECK; enum values defined in global enums registry

soft_delete_policy.filter: deleted_at IS NULL applied globally via query builder middleware
soft_delete_policy.cascade: Parent delete soft-deletes children via application cascade, not DB cascade
soft_delete_policy.hard_delete: Prohibited in production; available only via admin CLI with audit log
soft_delete_policy.restore: Set deleted_at = NULL; triggers audit log entry

naming_conventions.date_fields: Always use _at suffix for TIMESTAMPTZ, _date suffix for DATE
naming_conventions.id_fields: Primary key is always id; foreign keys are {entity}_id
